posts.text: BREAKING: OpenAI has proposed giving the Trump Administration a 5% stake in the company to "clear political obstacles," per FT. Details include: 1. Sam Altman has argued that giving the public a financial stake in the company is the best way to share the upside of AI 2. OpenAI is reportedly in "early talks" for a public ownership deal as political pressure rises 3. The proposed arrangement would involve other US AI companies handing over a similar stake 4. Sam Altman is reportedly in active talks with the Trump Administration about the situation The Trump Administration may soon have equity in US AI giants.
posts.author: KobeissiLetter

posts.text: *PALMER LUCKEY’S EREBOR BANK EYES AT LEAST $8 BILLION VALUATION
